notes: Scheduler publishes SERVICE_PLAN_CHANGED domain events; consumed by offer-service (links offered plan to service plan number) and order-service (ServicePlanDomainEventConsumer).
Order-service stages outbound domain events into the outbox_messages table instead of producing Kafka directly; the scheduler outbox publisher reads and publishes them to Kafka.

topic_or_endpoint: REST services.offer.base-url (V3 offer search / reprice / offered-service-plan)
notes: Web-integrator OfferClient calls offer-service (services.offer.base-url -> iom-offer-service) for new-booking search, amendment search, repriced offers, offered-plan retrieval, equipment deletion.
Web-integrator OrderClient calls order-service (services.order.base-url -> iom-order-service) for service-plan CRUD, status, search, incidents, finops, container associations, vessel-date updates.
Scheduler OfferScheduler/OfferClient calls offer-service DELETE to clean up old offered-service-plan records by age.
Scheduler RepricingWorkflow/WebIntegratorClient PATCH-calls web-integrator (services.iom-wi.base-url) to reprice a service plan from a Temporal repricing activity.

payload: location / commodity / charge-type / sales-object / container-type lookups
notes: Offer-service master-data WebClients resolve geoId locations, charge types, commodity, sales objects and container types from IOM Master Data Service (maersk.masterdata-base-url -> iom-master-data).
Offer-service FacilityClient looks up facility data from the SMDS facilities service during offer search location enrichment.
